# Upstream Mirror

This directory mirrors the upstream `xiaofenggan01/aigc-reduce` project files
used by thesis-standardizer's local AIGC workflow.

- Upstream repository: `https://github.com/xiaofenggan01/aigc-reduce`
- License: MIT

The mirrored files are used as the canonical local reference for:

- detection dimensions
- deep AI-writing pattern descriptions
- replacement tables
- scan-script behavior

Project-specific wrappers still write thesis-standardizer reports into
`paper-context/aigc/`, but the underlying wording and scan logic should stay
aligned with this mirror.
